final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: architectural-concept-illustration
Asset type: futuristic architectural concept art, wide landscape
Primary request: a streamlined white building floating in the air, surrounded by drones and holographic projections, with clean energy facilities, embodying a sustainable urban development vision
Scene/backdrop: open sky with soft clouds, elevated urban environment, solar panels and wind turbines integrated into the structure below
Subject: sleek white futuristic building with smooth curved surfaces, anti-gravity suspension, holographic projection displays floating around it, autonomous drones in flight nearby, clean energy infrastructure (solar arrays, vertical wind turbines)
Style/medium: architectural concept illustration, photorealistic 3D render
Composition/framing: wide-angle view, slight low-angle perspective, full building visible with sky as backdrop
Lighting/mood: bright daylight with soft diffused light, optimistic and visionary atmosphere, clean and airy
Color palette: pure white and light grey building surfaces + sky blue + soft cyan holographic glow + touches of green from vegetation
Materials/textures: smooth matte white composite panels, glass facades with subtle reflections, translucent holographic light projections
Constraints: building must appear genuinely floating/levitating, clean energy elements must be clearly visible, no dark or dystopian tones
Avoid: cluttered composition, dark cyberpunk aesthetic, deformed architecture, watermark
